name: X-Golf Burlington
about: X-Golf Burlington is a state-of-the-art indoor golf simulator venue featuring seven advanced simulators for year-round play and training. The facility offers a unique combination of high-tech golf simulation, a full bar, and a restaurant, making it suitable for both serious practice and social entertainment. Pricing is structured per simulator hour, accommodating up to six people per bay, and the venue features PGA-certified coaching for players looking to improve their skills in a modern environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Unparalleled accuracy and realism through advanced camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors
On-site full bar and restaurant with a diverse menu for post-game dining and socializing
Flexible pricing model that accommodates both individual players and large groups
PGA-certified coaching and V1 Pro Golf training technology for skill improvement
Private simulator availability for VIPs and special events

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen offering shareable bites, appetizers, snacks, pizzas, and more. Menu available online.
Full bar with beer by the glass or on tap, cocktails, and wines.

simulator_hardware.notes: Proprietary system combining camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors

faq.question: Do I need golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, rental clubs are available, but players are encouraged to bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, X-Golf Burlington has an on-site full bar and kitchen with food available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Generally it takes 1 hour for an individual player to play 18 holes. With more players, add 1 hour per person.

faq.question: Is X-Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome, though children 16 and younger must be accompanied by an adult.
